message:
feat(analytics): add comprehensive GA4 analytics infrastructure

This commit introduces a full-featured Google Analytics 4 integration for
tracking user engagement and tutorial funnel conversion, modeled after
the flywheel project implementation.

New files:
- analytics.ts: Core analytics library with:
  - Document view tracking (transcripts, distillations, quotes)
  - Scroll depth tracking (25/50/75/90/100%)
  - Time on document milestones (30s, 60s, 2min, 5min, 10min)
  - Tutorial funnel tracking with localStorage state persistence
  - Conversion events for engagement milestones
  - Server-side Measurement Protocol support

- analytics-provider.tsx: Client-side GA4 initialization with:
  - Next.js App Router integration
  - Automatic page view tracking
  - Scroll depth observer
  - Time on page tracking
  - Visibility change handling

- api/track/route.ts: Server-side tracking API with:
  - Rate limiting (60 req/min per IP)
  - Payload validation and sanitization
  - Measurement Protocol integration

- useTutorialAnalytics.ts: React hook for tutorial components

- setup-ga4.ts: Script to configure GA4 property with:
  - 26 custom dimensions for engagement tracking
  - 11 conversion events for funnel analysis

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
